@@ -393,1 +393,17 @@
-                                2)
+                                2),
+                        new DiagAndCode(
+                                """
+                                interface I {
+                                    String! m();
+                                }
+                                class Test {
+                                    public String! m() { return ""; }
+                                }
+                                class Sub extends Test implements I {
+                                    @Override
+                                    public String m() { return null; }
+                                }
+                                """,
+                                Result.Warning,
+                                "compiler.warn.incompatible.null.restrictions",
+                                2) // one warning per each method in the corresponding parents
@@ -415,1 +431,1 @@
